pi_items.source: Task operations and strict verifier constraints (6 multi-part conditions)

pi_items.metadata_value: Culinary School Director / Commercial Kitchen Designer
pi_items.verified_value: Culinary School Director / Commercial Kitchen Designer
pi_items.source: Task description explicitly addresses the agent as 'Chef Antoine' expanding a culinary institute.
Task description involves a culinary arts training facility.
verifier.py logic sums criteria scores up to 100
setup_task.sh creates this file dynamically by stripping furniture from SweetHome3DExample7.sh3d
export_result.sh and verifier.py actively track new_walls, new_doors, furniture_count, zone_identifiers, and new_dimensions.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated building shell created by stripping furniture from the sample 'SweetHome3DExample7.sh3d'. The agent must fulfill six complex scoring criteria to pass (>= 70/100 points). The verifier explicitly tracks newly placed walls, doors, tables, chairs, ovens, shelves, fridges, sinks, zone identifiers, and dimension lines. Note a discrepancy in the verifier: although the prompt strictly requires 'at least 2 dishwashers', the verifier's C4 logic completely ignores dishwasher count when scoring.
